blocks.body: Present Continuous: pytania i krótkie odpowiedzi — Am I...?, Is she...?, Are they...? i krótkie odpowiedzi.

{"level":"A1–A2","intro":"W pytaniach Present Continuous forma am / is / are przechodzi przed podmiot, a czasownik główny zostaje w formie -ing.","rules":[{"label":"Am I ...?","color":"emerald","text":"Z I zaczynaj pytanie od am.","example":"Am I talking too fast?"},{"label":"Is he / she / it ...?","color":"blue","text":"Z he / she / it używaj is przed podmiotem.","example":"Is she working now?"},{"label":"Are you / we / they ...?","color":"amber","text":"Z you / we / they używaj are przed podmiotem.","example":"Are they coming with us?"}]}

{"title":"1. Podstawowe modele pytań","intro":"Pytania budujemy przez be, a nie przez do / does.","items":[{"label":"I","title":"Am I + verb-ing?","subtitle":"Am I speaking clearly?"},{"label":"He / She / It","title":"Is he / she / it + verb-ing?","subtitle":"Is he sleeping? / Is it raining?"},{"label":"You / We / They","title":"Are you / we / they + verb-ing?","subtitle":"Are you listening? / Are they waiting outside?"},{"label":"Short Answers","title":"Yes, ... am / is / are.","subtitle":"Yes, I am. / No, she isn't. / Yes, they are."}]}

{"title":"2. Jak odpowiadać krótko","sections":[{"label":"Yes","color":"emerald","description":"W krótkiej odpowiedzi twierdzącej powtórz formę be.","examples":[{"en":"Are you studying now? — Yes, I am.","ua":"Tak, teraz się uczę."},{"en":"Is he working today? — Yes, he is.","ua":"Tak, dziś pracuje."}]},{"label":"No","color":"blue","description":"W krótkiej odpowiedzi przeczącej bardzo często używamy isn't / aren't.","examples":[{"en":"Is she sleeping? — No, she isn't.","ua":"Nie, ona nie śpi."},{"en":"Are they waiting? — No, they aren't.","ua":"Nie, oni nie czekają."}]},{"label":"Szyk wyrazów","color":"amber","description":"Porównaj zdanie twierdzące i pytanie: forma be przechodzi przed podmiot.","examples":[{"en":"She is reading. → Is she reading?","ua":"Inwersja z be."},{"en":"They are coming. → Are they coming?","ua":"Bez do / does."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Pytanie i krótka odpowiedź","intro":"W odpowiedzi nie powtarzaj całego zdania. Wystarczy krótka forma.","rows":[{"en":"Am I talking too fast?","ua":"Yes, you are. / No, you aren't.","note":"Na Am I...? często odpowiadamy you are / you aren't."},{"en":"Is she working now?","ua":"Yes, she is. / No, she isn't.","note":"is → she is / she isn't"},{"en":"Are they waiting for us?","ua":"Yes, they are. / No, they aren't.","note":"are → they are / they aren't"}],"warning":"Nie mów Do they are waiting? ani Yes, she does."}

{"title":"4. Typowe błędy","items":[{"label":"Błąd 1","color":"rose","title":"Dodawanie do / does do Present Continuous.","wrong":"❌ Do they are waiting outside?","right":"✅ Are they waiting outside?"},{"label":"Błąd 2","color":"amber","title":"Zostawianie be po podmiocie jak w zdaniu twierdzącym.","wrong":"❌ She is reading now?","right":"✅ Is she reading now?"},{"label":"Błąd 3","color":"sky","title":"Używanie do w krótkiej odpowiedzi.","wrong":"❌ Yes, she does.","right":"✅ Yes, she is."}]}

{"title":"5. Krótkie podsumowanie","items":["Pytanie w Present Continuous = am / is / are + subject + verb-ing.","Z I zaczynaj od Am I...?","Z he / she / it zaczynaj od Is...?","Z you / we / they zaczynaj od Are...?","W krótkich odpowiedziach powtarzaj formę be: Yes, I am. / No, she isn't."]}
